profile.name: Alan
profile.title: Ingeniero Full-Stack Senior · AI-native · React/Next + .NET
profile.description:
Ingeniero full-stack senior (~4,5 años) que entrega de punta a punta: React 19/Next.js + TypeScript en el front, backend real en .NET y PostgreSQL, y el trabajo de plataforma que lo sostiene (CI/CD, testing, observabilidad).

Trabajo AI-native de verdad: Claude Code, agentes LLM y MCP son parte de cómo entrego, no un adorno. De hecho definí las convenciones de ingeniería con IA de mi equipo (un CLAUDE.md y skills de revisión versionadas).

En un SaaS de edificios inteligentes acabé operando por encima de mi título: fui el #1 contribuidor neto del código, sostuve el frontend en solitario ~8 meses y, en mi tramo final, el CTO me delegó la coordinación de entregas entre departamentos que llevaba él. Me interesa tanto encuadrar el problema como resolverlo.

Vengo de una base en filosofía y psicología, y la uso como herramienta de trabajo: antes de atacar un problema me pregunto si está bien planteado. Eso, más ser trilingüe (español nativo, francés bilingüe, inglés profesional) y remote-first, es lo que aporto a un equipo además del código.

location.notes: Autocompleted using Google Maps API (id: ChIJBx4GBoeUlxIRUtQsMHk3UuE)

interestingFacts.fact:
I am passionate about philosophy and psychology. I am currently writing a book on philosophy and wellbeing focusing on what I consider to be one of the scarcest resources and of which we, human beings, are the source: love. Seen in a
completely new and even avant-garde way.
I love the world of Graphic Design, UX and UI, so I also learn about it by myself. I've done some drawings and illustrations. For my client I've done some Logo design and marketing brochures.
I'm a person who cares about others. So I decided to study two of the big themes in my live. Even though I couldn't finish those careers as I decided to study IT.

challenges.description:
Startup con una PWA de vanguardia en el sector de recursos humanos enfocado en plantillas amplias y diversas con turnos flexibles con la mayor eficiencia y ahorro. 
App de grandes dimensiones y complejidades. Trabajo intenso con tiempos de entrega cortos, maximizada eficiencia. En un equipo proactivo y de máxima cooperación, con alta coordinación entre departamentos.
Alta responsabilidad individual:
- Revisión de código
- Autoaprobación de ramas
- QA UX
- Libertad de elección de tareas

- Refactorizando de JS a TS en React a bitDev para crear librería de compontentes interna, design system y micro-frontends.
- Diseñador de apoyo de UX/UI
- Especializado en:
 - Time zones
 - Themes de clientes
 - Ant Design
 - React Query
 - Comunicación asíncrona
- STACK extra: 
 - Redux / Redux-Saga,
 - CSS, SCSS, Emotion, 
 - Mockoon
 - Entornos Linux, zsh, ohmyzsh.
 - Gitlab, Mattermost, Airtable
 - Open Replay, Sentry

Íntegro is a consumer services company that offers itself as a nexus to provide personalised services acting as such between client and company.

I am currently solely responsible for the design and development of Íntegro's website. I advise on the technologies to be used, create the architecture of the company's website and decide on the technologies to be used, as well as the hosting. I also work as a graphic designer, creating flayers, company logos and the design of the UX and UI. I do it all on my own.

Development of a front-end web app in an Agile Scrum environment.

It's a wonderful experience with a great team. Learning from each other, proposing solutions between all of us, we have come a long way. Understanding and camaraderie are our daily bread. Fears go away, you make friends and connect with people from whom you always have something to learn. 

Developing front end with TypeScript for the first time was not too difficult thanks to the JavaScript base. I gained knowledge of token implementation. I'm excited about the open and flexible way of programming we have. We are always looking for standalone components that have the greatest flexibility of implementation. As our CEO says, "the component should not know what the other component is doing", which makes for an extremely dynamic programme. 

For the first time I was working in parallel and relying on a specialised UX and UI team, so I had to practice good communication, without fear, asking all the necessary questions so that everything goes smoothly. Better to ask and do it well than to do it without knowing and regret it later, double work.

details.name: Ucoll - Full-Stack Developer - Lead
details.description:
Ucoll is a Social Media Project university students oriented. We wanted to implement a lot of tools to ease the university life and a easy contacting system between the students without the need of exanche your mobile phone number or your email.

It's the final project of the 4Geeks Academy Full-Stack Bootcamp that I've done with my two teammates, one back end strong and the other front end strong.

Proud of fostering team spirit and optimal pace, of being a fast programmer and researcher of new knowledge to consolidate the project and of having delved into the world of UX and UI as app designer.

I was the one who suppervised the back and the front work, to encourage the team to give its best.

Nowadays, as we grew in knowledge, we would have done the project in a complete other way, even so I'm proud of it despite its precariousness.

institution.name: 4Geeks Academy
institution.description: Bootcamp developed by 4Geeks Academy working-oriented that initiates the student on the web programming world.

manfredSpecificData.desiredJobDescription: Busco un equipo donde la calidad de ingeniería importe (testing, revisión de código, tipos) y donde entregue de punta a punta, del front al backend. Me motiva encuadrar el problema, no solo ejecutarlo. Quiero seguir trabajando AI-native (Claude Code, agentes, MCP) y llevar esas prácticas al equipo. Me importa que la empresa tenga un modelo de negocio sólido y con recorrido; la modalidad (remoto, presencial en Palma o híbrido) es flexible.
manfredSpecificData.goodPractices: Me importan de verdad. Priorizo KISS y evito la sobreingeniería: la solución más simple que funcione, con SOLID y código limpio como base. El testing es parte del desarrollo, no un extra: unitario con Vitest y end-to-end con Playwright, más CI/CD con feature flags y observabilidad (Sentry). Cuido las convenciones de equipo: de hecho definí las de ingeniería con IA en mi último equipo (un CLAUDE.md y skills de revisión versionadas). Mi inercia natural es la solidez y la limpieza.
